title: [hal-cli] CLI entry point
description: Implement CLI: cg (hook mode, default — stdin JSON -> evaluate -> stdout), cg test 'command' (human-readable output with colors), cg install (Copilot + Claude Code). Argparse dispatch. Wrap everything in try/except -> exit 0 (fail-open). ~60 LOC in cg/__main__.py.

title: [hal-pack-azure] cloud.azure.yaml pack
description: Write packs/cloud.azure.yaml: rules for az group delete, vm delete, storage account delete, sql server/db delete, aks delete, acr delete/repository delete, keyvault delete/purge, network vnet/nsg delete, webapp delete, functionapp delete. Keywords: [az].

title: [hal-test-extract] Tests: extraction + segments
description: Tests for extract_inline (bash -c cmd, python -c cmd, node -e cmd, no-flag cases), extract_heredoc (bash <<EOF, heredoc piped to sh, non-interpreter heredoc ignored), split_segments (pipe, &&, ||, ;, quoted strings containing operators, nested quotes).

title: [hal-test-install] Tests: install command
description: Tests for install: Copilot install creates .github/hooks/cg.json, Claude install writes hooks format, --project flag uses .claude/settings.json, merges with existing hooks, --no-configure updates path only. Use tmp dirs.

title: [cg-heredoc-extract] Heredoc extraction
description: - type: task

title: [hal-normalizer] Command normalizer
description: Implement normalize() to strip sudo (handle -u user consuming next token), env (handle VAR=val and -u name), backslash prefix, command wrapper (but NOT command -v/-V), and absolute paths for known binaries. Iterative until stable. MUST handle: sudo -u root git, env -u FOO git, env VAR=1 VAR2=2 git. ~30 LOC in evaluate.py.

title: [hal-pack-loader] YAML pack loader
description: Implement load_packs(): scan packs/ dir for *.yaml, parse with PyYAML, compile regex patterns (re.compile with re.ASCII), build keyword index. Return list of Pack dataclasses with rules. Handle pack_dirs from config for custom pack locations. ~60 LOC in cg/packs.py.

title: [hal-config] Config loading
description: Implement load_config(): read ~/.config/cg/config.yaml + .cg.yaml (project-level, wins on merge). Fields: packs list, allow list, allow_rules list, allow_prefixes list, severity_threshold (default high), pack_dirs list. Return Config dataclass. All optional — zero-config defaults work. ~40 LOC in cg/evaluate.py or cg/config.py.

title: [hal-test-normalizer] Tests: command normalizer
description: Tests for normalize(): sudo stripping (sudo git, sudo -u root git, sudo -g group git), env stripping (env VAR=1 git, env -u FOO git, env -i git), backslash prefix, abs paths (/usr/bin/git, /usr/local/bin/rm), command wrapper (command -- git but NOT command -v git), iterative (sudo env backslash-git), edge cases.

title: [hal-install] Install command
description: Implement install subcommand: cg install writes .github/hooks/cg.json (Copilot, default). cg install --claude writes ~/.claude/settings.json. cg install --claude --project writes .claude/settings.json. Must merge with existing hooks, not overwrite. Include --no-configure flag to update hook binary path without changing config. ~50 LOC.

title: [hal-pack-fs] core.filesystem.yaml pack
description: Write packs/core.filesystem.yaml: rules for rm -rf (flags_contain: [r,f], unless_path: [/tmp/*, node_modules, .cache, __pycache__, target, dist, build]), chmod 777, chmod -R, chown -R on system dirs. Must include path traversal detection — reject paths containing '..'. Keywords: [rm, chmod, chown, mkfs, dd].

title: [hal-pipeline] Evaluation pipeline
description: Implement evaluate(command, packs, config, _depth=0) -> Decision. Pipeline: config allow check -> normalize -> keyword pre-filter -> split_segments on |, &&, ||, ; -> per-segment: tokenize (shlex, fail-open to str.split) -> inline script extraction (recurse once) -> heredoc extraction (recurse once per line) -> match rules (token-based first, regex fallback with sanitize). ~80 LOC in cg/evaluate.py.

title: [hal-test-evaluate] Tests: evaluation pipeline
description: Comprehensive tests for evaluate(): token matching (all 5 packs, deny + allow cases), normalization (sudo, env, backslash, abs paths, command wrapper), inline script extraction (bash -c, python -c), heredoc extraction, segment splitting (pipes, &&, ||, ;), sanitizer (false-positive prevention for commit messages, echo, grep -e), severity threshold, config allow/allow_rules overrides. Port validated cases from test_token_matching.py (136 cases).

title: [hal-e2e] End-to-end verification
description: End-to-end verification: run all test suites (pytest -v), then manual smoke tests: cg test 'git reset --hard' (DENY), cg test 'git commit -m fix rm -rf' (ALLOW), cg test 'echo rm -rf /' (ALLOW), cg test 'sudo git reset --hard' (DENY), cg test 'bash -c "git reset --hard"' (DENY), cg test 'git checkout -b feature' (ALLOW), pipe Copilot JSON -> cg (deny JSON), pipe Claude JSON -> cg (deny JSON). Verify all 7 checks from PLAN.md.

title: [hal-token-engine] Token matching engine
description: Implement parse_flags() with LONG_FLAG_MAP to expand --recursive to -r/-R, --force to -f, --verbose to -v so flags_contain works with both short and long flags. Implement match_rule() with has_all, has_any, flags_contain, unless, unless_path (with path traversal detection — reject paths containing ..), path_is. Implement get_path_args(). ~40 LOC in evaluate.py. CRITICAL: must handle rm --recursive --force which bare parse_flags misses.

title: [hal-test-hook] Tests: end-to-end hook I/O
description: Tests for hook I/O: Copilot protocol (pre-tool-use event, toolName, toolInput, toolArgs as JSON string), Claude Code protocol (tool_name, tool_input), deny output format (both protocols), allow output (exit 0 empty stdout), warn severity ask decision, malformed input fail-open, non-Bash tool pass-through. Full round-trip stdin->evaluate->stdout.

title: [hal-extraction] Inline/heredoc extraction + segment splitting
description: Implement three related functions in evaluate.py: (1) extract_inline(tokens) — detect bash -c, sh -c, python -c, node -e etc and return the inline script string. (2) extract_heredoc(command) — detect <<EOF heredocs piped to/invoked by interpreters, return body for recursive eval. (3) split_segments(command) — split on |, &&, ||, ; respecting quotes. All three are small (~15 LOC each, ~45 LOC total) and tightly coupled in the pipeline.

title: [hal-scaffold] Project scaffolding
description: Create pyproject.toml (console_scripts: cg, dep: PyYAML), cg/__init__.py (version), cg/__main__.py stub, packs/ dir, tests/ dir. Minimal skeleton so other beads can import from cg package. ~20 LOC.

title: [hal-pack-docker] containers.docker.yaml pack
description: Write packs/containers.docker.yaml: rules for system prune -a, volume prune, rmi (unless specific tag), rm -f, stop/kill with $(docker ps) (REGEX FALLBACK — token matching can't handle command substitution), compose down -v, swarm leave --force. Keywords: [docker, docker-compose, podman].

title: [hal-pack-git] core.git.yaml pack
description: Write packs/core.git.yaml: rules for reset --hard, push --force (unless --force-with-lease), clean -f (unless -n/--dry-run), stash clear, stash drop, branch -D, checkout --, restore (unless --staged/-S), rebase --abort, reflog expire/delete. Keywords: [git]. Reference test_token_matching.py for validated rules.

title: [hal-hook-io] Hook I/O protocol
description: Implement hook I/O: detect_protocol() (Copilot vs Claude Code from input JSON), extract_command() (handle tool_input, toolInput, toolArgs as string/dict). Output: Copilot deny (continue:false, permissionDecision:deny), Claude deny (hookSpecificOutput with permissionDecision:deny). Allow = exit 0 empty stdout. Also handle warn severity: Copilot ask decision, Claude ask decision. ~60 LOC in cg/__main__.py or cg/hook.py.

title: [hal-test-packs] Tests: pack loading
description: Tests for pack loading: valid YAML parse, regex compilation (re.ASCII flag), keyword index building, malformed YAML graceful skip (fail-open), missing fields default handling, pack_dirs custom loading, duplicate rule name detection.

title: [cg-segment-split] Command segment splitter
description: - type: task

title: [hal-sanitizer] Regex fallback sanitizer
description: Implement sanitize(tokens): mask data tokens for regex fallback rules only. ALL_ARGS_DATA commands (echo, printf) mask everything. FLAG_DATA dict maps commands to flags whose next token is data (-m, --message, etc). Replace masked content with underscores. ~30 LOC in cg/evaluate.py.

title: [hal-pack-aws] cloud.aws.yaml pack
description: Write packs/cloud.aws.yaml: rules for s3 rm --recursive, s3 rb, ec2 terminate-instances, rds delete-db-instance (unless --skip-final-snapshot), dynamodb delete-table, lambda delete-function, cloudformation delete-stack, iam delete-user/role/policy, route53 delete-hosted-zone, eks delete-cluster. Keywords: [aws].
